action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of all environmental sensors and facility systems including PM2.5 levels and equipment statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: set_purifier_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the operating mode of the indoor air purifier.

mode.description: The desired operating mode for the purifier.

action_set_definitions.name: set_window_position
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the facility's motorized windows to open or close.

position.description: The target physical state of the windows.

action_set_definitions.name: set_hvac_fan_status
action_set_definitions.description: Turns the HVAC system fan on or off to assist with air circulation/filtration.

active.description: True to activate the fan, False to deactivate.

action_set_definitions.name: set_alert_level
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the facility-wide alert level based on environmental threats.

level.description: The alert level corresponding to current outdoor air quality threats.

state_description.indoor_pm25: Current indoor PM2.5 concentration in μg/m³
state_description.outdoor_pm25: Current outdoor PM2.5 concentration in μg/m³
state_description.purifier_status: Operating mode of the air purifier: 'off', 'low', 'medium', 'high', or 'auto'
state_description.window_position: Physical state of the windows: 'open' or 'closed'
state_description.hvac_fan_active: Whether the HVAC system fan is currently running
state_description.alert_level: Current system alert status based on air quality: 'normal', 'warning', or 'emergency'
